candidates.why: Direct COGS line and more appropriate than total/balancing alternatives.
Inventory asset, not period cost of goods sold.

candidates.why: A component within cost of revenues, not total COGS.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected operating overhead components above EBIT. Included 'Research and development costs' per rule so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes R&D. Excluded lowercase duplicate-looking selling/administrative rows to avoid likely double counting with the main uppercase rows.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
Capitalized development amount, not the primary period R&D expense.

Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. This same row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D.

candidates.why: Finance-cost total, but less preferred than granular recurring interest components when available.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.why: Comprehensive income flow, not book equity stock.

Also valid equity line, but slightly less preferred than explicit shareholders' equity wording.
Shareholder count, not book equity.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest line is present. Used shareholder equity labels as priority list; later code can take first non-missing. Because BE uses total/shareholder equity here, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet. Using empty mapping is appropriate; BE is mapped to total/shareholders' equity and MIB should therefore remain zero.
